name: Temporal Reasoning
description: Tests temporal sequencing with events planted out of chronological order.

facts.planted_as: Two months ago I got promoted to mid-level developer.

facts.content: Started learning Python on my own
facts.planted_as: About a year and a half ago, I started learning Python on my own.
Four months ago I completed an advanced React course.

facts.content: Got my first junior developer job at a startup
facts.planted_as: A year ago I got my first junior developer job at a startup.

facts.content: Switched to a larger company and learned C#
facts.planted_as: Eight months ago I switched to a larger company and learned C# there.

facts.content: Led my first project as tech lead
facts.planted_as: Last month I led my first project as tech lead!

noise_between_facts: The coffee machine at work broke again today.
I need to update my LinkedIn profile.
My teammate recommended a great coding podcast.

queries.question: Can you put my career milestones in chronological order, from earliest to most recent?
What was the first thing I learned in my tech career?
What's the most recent career milestone I mentioned?
